untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific chart patterns (horizontal top, lower lows following down-sloping trendline, broadening formation) which cannot be expressed as simple indicator comparisons. These geometric pattern features require pattern recognition logic beyond the allowed operators and indicators.
translation_notes: Approximated entry using upward volume trend and upward breakout (close above previous high). Pattern detection for 'broadening formations, right-angled and descending' with horizontal tops and lower lows is not translatable to numeric indicator conditions. Exit condition uses SMA_20 as a reasonable reversal point. Success rates from source (19% bull, 6% bear) and throwback percentages (52%/50%) are documented but cannot be directly encoded as conditions.
